# list alerts by account

GET https://api.jambonz.cloud/v1/Accounts/{AccountSid}/Alerts

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.1.1
info:
  title: list alerts by account
  version: endpoint_alerts.listAlertsByAccount
paths:
  /Accounts/{AccountSid}/Alerts:
    get:
      operationId: list-alerts-by-account
      summary: list alerts by account
      parameters:
        - name: AccountSid
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: page
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: integer
        - name: severity
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: string
            enum:
              - critical
              - warning
        - name: Authorization
          in: header
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ok
```
